text.tspan: Root Directory Data Block (Physical Block ID: data_start)

ol.li: Block Alignment: Total size is exactly 4096 bytes. All entries are 8-byte aligned.

Invariants:
DirEntry[0] (offset 0): Must be . (current directory).
DirEntry[1] (offset 280): Must be .. (parent directory).
Search Logic: Kernel iterates by adding rec_len to current offset until inode == 0 (end of list) or block boundary is reached.

Byte Layout:
inode: 4B
rec_len: 2B
name_len: 1B
file_type: 1B
name: 256B (Fixed width)
padding: 12B
